ns0:entry.ns0:title: AlDanial/cloc
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/AlDanial/cloc
Language: perl
cloc counts blank lines, comment lines, and physical lines of source code in many programming languages.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Difegue/LANraragi
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Difegue/LANraragi
Language: perl
Web application for archival and reading of manga/doujinshi. Lightweight and Docker-ready for NAS/servers.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: LMS-Community/slimserver
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/LMS-Community/slimserver
Language: perl
Server for Squeezebox and compatible players. This server is also called Lyrion Music Server.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: inverse-inc/packetfence
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/inverse-inc/packetfence
Language: perl
PacketFence is a fully supported, trusted, Free and Open Source network access control (NAC) solution. Boasting an impressive feature set including a captive-portal for registration and remediation, centralized wired and wireless management, powerful BYOD management options, 802.1X support, layer-2 isolation of problematic devices; PacketFence c…

ns0:entry.ns0:title: manwar/perlweeklychallenge-club
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/manwar/perlweeklychallenge-club
Language: perl
Knowledge base for The Weekly Challenge club members using Perl, Raku, Ada, APL, Awk, Bash, BASIC, Bc, Befunge-93, Bourne Shell, BQN, Brainfuck, C3, C, CESIL, C++, C#, Clojure, COBOL, Coconut, Crystal, D, Dart, Dc, Elm, Emacs Lisp, Erlang, Excel VBA, Fennel, Fish, Forth, Fortran, Gembase, GNAT, Go, Haskell, Haxe, HTML, Idris, IO, J, Janet, Java,…
